scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun run build:bundle
scripts.build:prod: bun run typecheck && bun build src/main.ts --target=browser --format=iife --outfile=dist/goldenlap.js --minify --reject-unresolved
scripts.test:unit: bun run build && bun run check:boundaries && bun run test:unit:raw
scripts.test:browser: bun run build && bun run test:browser:raw
scripts.test:season: bun run build && bun run test:season:raw
scripts.verify: bun run build && bun run check:boundaries && bun run test:unit:raw && bun run test:browser:raw && bun run test:season:raw && bun run test:prod
